/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/bench.dir/test/bench/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench.dir/test/bench/LoggerInitialize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench.dir/test/bench/PosixTimerBench.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench.dir/test/bench/TimerPosix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench.dir/test/bench/TimerPosixStandaloneBench.cpp.o -o bench  libpmx-suite.a libpmx-common.a -lpthread -lrt libs/simple-svg/libsimple-svg.a libs/PathFinding/libpmr-pathfinding.a
